bullets: Design overhaul — new Geist typography, hero app header on Details, redesigned Home cards with platform glyphs, Apple-style menus, and a refreshed Library with an updates banner and a 'Ready to install' section.
Tablet two-pane layout — Home, Search, and Library keep the list on the left and open the repo on the right; drag the divider to resize.
Inner Details pages — About and What's New now slide in as dedicated screens with their own back action, and stay inside the right pane on tablet.
Real Apple and Tux icons for the macOS and Linux platform indicators across cards and lists.
Discovery cards now show every platform a repo ships installers for, not just the one whose endpoint listed it.
What's New tag row no longer wraps long release tags into a one-character-wide vertical date column.
